text: Okay. Next question. I feel it would be a transient type of question, however, it has been asked me by one whom I've communicated with who has been intensely involved. You have a full portion of the phenomena if you deem it too transient or important, but skip it. But you've been asked, how is it possible for the craft, shall we say the fourth density, to get here. And that it seems that as you approach the velocity of light, mass approaches infinite. We have talked about the increase of spiritual mass, and it was just questioned as to how this how this transition from very distant planets is made in craft. And uh my question would be why craft would be necessary at all. This is not an important question. I am Rob. You have asked several questions we shall respond in turn. Firstly, we agree that this material is a transient. Secondly, those for the most part are coming from a distant point as you turn them. Do not need craft as you know then. The query itself requires understanding which you do not possess. We shall attempt to state what may be stated. However, such entities have learned to use hydrogen in a way different from your understanding now. These entities still take a quite long durations of time as you measure it to move about how ever these entities are able to use hypothermia to slow the physical and mental complex processes in order to withstand the duration of flight. Those such as are from Assyrias are of this type. There are the two other types. One is the type which a coming from fourth, fifth, or sixth density in your own galaxy has access to a type of energy system which uses the speed of light as a slingshot and thus arrives where it wishes without any perceptible time elapsed in your view. The other type of experience is that of fourth, fifth, and sixth densities of other galaxies and a sum within your own galaxy which have learned the necessary disciplines of personality to view the universe as one being, and therefore are able to proceed from locus to locus by thought alone materializing the necessary craft if you will, to enclose the light body of the entity.

segment.segment: Okay.
Next question.
I feel it would be a transient type of question, however, it has been asked me by one whom I've communicated with who has been intensely involved.

This is not an important question.
I am Rob.
You have asked several questions we shall respond in turn.
Firstly, we agree that this material is a transient.
Secondly, those for the most part are coming from a distant point as you turn them.
Do not need craft as you know then.

These entities still take a quite long durations of time as you measure it to move about how ever these entities are able to use hypothermia to slow the physical and mental complex processes in order to withstand the duration of flight.

There are the two other types.

One is the type which a coming from fourth, fifth, or sixth density in your own galaxy has access to a type of energy system which uses the speed of light as a slingshot and thus arrives where it wishes without any perceptible time elapsed in your view.

The other type of experience is that of fourth, fifth, and sixth densities of other galaxies and a sum within your own galaxy which have learned the necessary disciplines of personality to view the universe as one being, and therefore are able to proceed from locus to locus by thought alone materializing the necessary craft if you will, to enclose the light body of the entity.
